name: Oxnard
notes: Largest city in Ventura County. Significant manufacturing (agriculture-related, electronics, defense). Port Hueneme naval base nearby. Coastal zone along shoreline.

name: Ventura
notes: County seat (San Buenaventura). Mixed economy — oil production, some manufacturing, services. Ventura River and Santa Clara River mouths. Coastal zone along shoreline.

name: Thousand Oaks
notes: Mostly commercial/biotech (Amgen headquarters). Conejo Valley. Less heavy industry. Calleguas Creek watershed.

name: Simi Valley
notes: Light manufacturing, tech, business parks. Arroyo Simi flows to Calleguas Creek. Former Santa Susana Field Lab contamination issues nearby.

name: Moorpark
notes: Smaller scale industrial and business parks. Arroyo Las Posas tributary to Calleguas Creek. Agricultural surroundings.

name: Camarillo
notes: Business parks, light industrial, logistics. Pleasant Valley area. Calleguas Creek watershed. Agricultural processing.

name: Santa Paula
notes: Agricultural processing, smaller manufacturing. Citrus industry heritage. Santa Clara River corridor. Oil production history.

name: Fillmore
notes: Small agricultural city. Santa Clara River runs through city. Sespe Creek confluence. Sespe Creek is wild and scenic. Citrus and avocado farming.

name: Ojai
notes: Small tourist and arts city. Ojai Valley. Ventura River watershed. Lake Casitas nearby. Very limited industrial. Near Los Padres National Forest.

name: Port Hueneme
notes: Coastal city. Naval Base Ventura County. Port operations. Coastal zone applies citywide. Military and logistics.

name: Saticoy
notes: Unincorporated Ventura County community. Agricultural processing area along Santa Clara River between Ventura and Santa Paula. Environmental justice community.

name: El Rio
notes: Unincorporated Ventura County community. Agricultural and residential. Near Oxnard. Santa Clara River area. Ventura County Planning is lead agency.

name: Piru
notes: Unincorporated Ventura County community. Small agricultural community. Lake Piru nearby. Santa Clara River corridor.

name: Meiners Oaks
notes: Unincorporated Ventura County community. Adjacent to Ojai. Ventura River corridor. Residential and rural.

name: Oak Park
notes: Unincorporated Ventura County community. Suburban residential near Thousand Oaks and Agoura Hills. Calleguas Creek watershed.

name: Somis
notes: Unincorporated Ventura County community. Agricultural area between Camarillo and Moorpark. Calleguas Creek watershed.

name: Casa Conejo
notes: Unincorporated Ventura County community near Thousand Oaks. Residential. Calleguas Creek watershed.
